    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="fr">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>LCI·CLASQUIN — Suivi des Barres</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;700&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
    :root{
    --bg:#07090e;--s1:#0c0f17;--s2:#111520;--s3:#171c2a;
    --border:#1d2233;--border2:#252d42;
    --gold:#f0c040;--gold2:#ffd966;
    --blue:#4a9eff;--green:#3dd68c;--red:#ff5757;
    --orange:#ff8c42;--purple:#a855f7;--cyan:#22d3ee;
    --text:#e8ecf4;--text2:#7a8499;--text3:#343d52;
    --mono:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;--body:'Outfit',sans-serif;
    }
    *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
    html,body{height:100%;}
    body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--body);overflow-x:hidden;}
    @keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    @keyframes notifIn{from{transform:translateX(110%)}to{transform:translateX(0)}}
    .modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:500;background:rgba(7,9,14,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;}
    .modal-overlay.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .2s ease;}
    .modal-box{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:14px;padding:28px;width:100%;max-width:420px;animation:fadeUp .25s ease;}
    .modal-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .modal-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);margin-bottom:22px;}
    .modal-actions{display:flex;gap:9px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:20px;}
    #loginScreen{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:900;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;background:var(--bg);}
    .lglow{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 40% at 50% 0%,rgba(74,158,255,.06),transparent 60%),radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 60% at 85% 85%,rgba(240,192,64,.04),transparent 60%);}
    .lwrap{position:relative;width:100%;max-width:430px;animation:fadeUp .4s ease;}
    .l-logo{text-align:center;margin-bottom:32px;}
    .l-logo h1{font-size:24px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.06em;}
    .l-logo p{color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;font-family:var(--mono);letter-spacing:.14em;margin-top:5px;}
    .lbox{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:16px;padding:26px;}
    .lbox-title{text-align:center;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:20px;}
    .rpicker{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:18px;}
    .ropt{padding:13px 8px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid var(--border2);background:var(--s2);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--body);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;text-align:center;}
    .ropt .ri{font-size:20px;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;}
    .ropt:hover{border-color:var(--blue);}
    .ropt.sel{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(240,192,64,.06);color:var(--gold);}
    .aform{display:none;}
    .aform.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn .18s ease;}
    .fl{margin-bottom:12px;}
    .fl label{display:block;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px;}
    .fl input{width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:14px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:8px;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;}
    .fl input:focus{border-color:var(--gold);}
    .lerr{font-size:12px;font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--red);background:rgba(255,87,87,.07);border:1px solid rgba(255,87,87,.18);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 11px;margin-bottom:10px;display:none;}
    .btnlogin{width:100%;padding:12px;border-radius:9px;border:none;font-family:var(--body);font-size:15px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;letter-spacing:.04em;margin-top:2px;}
    .btnlogin.primary{background:var(--gold);color:#000;}
    .btnlogin.primary:hover{background:var(--gold2);transform:translateY(-1px);}
    .btnlogin.ghost{background:var(--s3);color:var(--text);border:1px solid var(--border2);}
    .btnlogin.ghost:hover{border-color:var(--gold);}
    #appShell{display:none;flex-direction:column;min-height:100vh;}
    header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:12px 22px;background:var(--s1);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;gap:12px;}
    .hlogo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;flex-shrink:0;}
    .hname{font-weight:800;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:.05em;}
    .hright{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
    .uchip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:5px 11px;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:20px;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--mono);}
    .udot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);}
    .ulvl{color:var(--text2);font-size:10px;}
    .btnout{padding:5px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:none;border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
    .btnout:hover{border-color:var(--red);color:var(--red);}
    nav{display:flex;padding:0 22px;background:var(--s1);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);overflow-x:auto;}
    nav button{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--body);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;padding:11px 15px;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;white-space:nowrap;transition:all .2s;}
    nav button:hover{color:var(--text);}
    nav button.active{color:var(--gold);border-bottom-color:var(--gold);}
    nav button:disabled{opacity:.22;cursor:not-allowed;pointer-events:none;}
    main{padding:22px;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;flex:1;}
    .page{display:none;}
    .page.active{display:block;animation:fadeIn .22s ease;}
    .card{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;margin-bottom:15px;}
    .ctitle{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);margin-bottom:13px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;}
    .ctitle::before{content:'';width:3px;height:3px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
    .frow{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px;}
    .fg{flex:1;min-width:160px;}
    label{display:block;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:5px;font-family:var(--mono);text-transform:uppercase;}
    select,input[type="text"],input[type="password"]{width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--body);font-size:13px;padding:8px 11px;border-radius:7px;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;}
    select:focus,input:focus{border-color:var(--gold);}
    .btn{padding:8px 16px;border-radius:7px;border:none;font-family:var(--body);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;letter-spacing:.03em;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
    .btn-gold{background:var(--gold);color:#000;}
    .btn-gold:hover{background:var(--gold2);transform:translateY(-1px);}
    .btn-ghost{background:var(--s2);color:var(--text);border:1px solid var(--border2);}
    .btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--gold);}
    .btn-danger{background:rgba(255,87,87,.1);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(255,87,87,.18);}
    .btn-danger:hover{background:var(--red);color:#fff;}
    .btn-sm{padding:5px 10px;font-size:12px;}
    .mgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(115px,1fr));gap:8px;margin-bottom:11px;}
    .mbtn{padding:12px 7px;border-radius:9px;border:2px solid var(--border2);background:var(--s2);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--body);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;text-align:center;}
    .mbtn:hover{border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--blue);}
    .mbtn.active{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(240,192,64,.06);color:var(--gold);}
    .mbtn .mi{font-size:18px;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;}
    .clisub{display:none;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:9px;align-items:center;}
    .clisub.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .2s ease;}
    .clisub .clilabel{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);}
    .cnbtn{padding:6px 15px;border-radius:7px;border:2px solid var(--border2);background:var(--s2);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
    .cnbtn:hover,.cnbtn.active{border-color:var(--orange);color:var(--orange);background:rgba(255,140,66,.07);}
    .szn{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(74,158,255,.03),rgba(240,192,64,.03));border:2px dashed var(--border2);border-radius:12px;padding:24px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px;transition:border-color .3s;}
    .szn:focus-within{border-color:var(--gold);}
    .szn .si{font-size:32px;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .szn p{color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;margin-bottom:10px;font-family:var(--mono);}
    .sinput{width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--gold);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;padding:12px 18px;border-radius:8px;outline:none;text-align:center;letter-spacing:.14em;transition:border-color .2s;}
    .sinput:focus{border-color:var(--gold);}
    .badge{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;font-size:11px;font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.04em;}
    .bg-gold{background:rgba(240,192,64,.13);color:var(--gold);}
    .bg-blue{background:rgba(74,158,255,.13);color:var(--blue);}
    .bg-green{background:rgba(61,214,140,.13);color:var(--green);}
    .bg-red{background:rgba(255,87,87,.13);color:var(--red);}
    .bg-orange{background:rgba(255,140,66,.13);color:var(--orange);}
    .bg-purple{background:rgba(168,85,247,.13);color:var(--purple);}
    .bg-cyan{background:rgba(34,211,238,.13);color:var(--cyan);}
    .bg-gray{background:rgba(74,85,104,.16);color:var(--text2);}
    .tw{overflow-x:auto;}
    table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px;}
    th{text-align:left;padding:8px 11px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);white-space:nowrap;}
    td{padding:10px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(29,34,51,.8);vertical-align:middle;}
    tr:hover td{background:rgba(255,255,255,.01);}
    .mono{font-family:var(--mono);}
    .srow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-bottom:18px;}
    .scard{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;}
    .sv{font-size:26px;font-weight:900;font-family:var(--mono);}
    .sl{font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;}
    .bgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(205px,1fr));gap:11px;}
    .bcard{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;transition:border-color .2s;}
    .bcard:hover{border-color:rgba(240,192,64,.3);}
    .bid{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:6px;}
    .binfo{font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.7;}
    .binfo strong{color:var(--text);}
    .ichips{display:flex;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:16px;}
    .ichip{padding:4px 11px;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--mono);}
    .ichip.set{border-color:rgba(240,192,64,.35);color:var(--gold);}
    .urow{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:11px 13px;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:7px;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .ur-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
    .ur-name{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;}
    .ur-role{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);}
    .ur-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;}
    .log-entry{padding:9px 13px;border-left:2px solid var(--border2);margin-bottom:6px;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--mono);}
    .log-entry.info{border-left-color:var(--blue);}
    .log-entry.success{border-left-color:var(--green);}
    .log-entry.warn{border-left-color:var(--orange);}
    .log-entry.error{border-left-color:var(--red);}
    .log-time{color:var(--text2);font-size:10px;margin-bottom:2px;}
    .filt{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:16px;align-items:flex-end;}
    .filt .fg{min-width:140px;}
    .empty{text-align:center;padding:40px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;}
    .empty .ei{font-size:36px;margin-bottom:10px;}
    .exprow{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-top:14px;}
    .div{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:16px 0;}
    .toggle-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
    .toggle{position:relative;width:40px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;}
    .toggle input{opacity:0;width:0;height:0;}
    .tslider{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--s3);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:20px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
    .tslider::before{content:'';position:absolute;width:16px;height:16px;left:2px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:var(--text2);border-radius:50%;transition:all .2s;}
    .toggle input:checked+.tslider{background:rgba(240,192,64,.2);border-color:var(--gold);}
    .toggle input:checked+.tslider::before{left:20px;background:var(--gold);}
    .toggle-label{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;}
    #notif{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;z-index:9999;padding:11px 18px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;font-family:var(--body);display:none;gap:8px;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.4);}
    #notif.show{display:flex;animation:notifIn .25s ease;}
    #notif.ok{background:var(--green);color:#000;}
    #notif.err{background:var(--red);color:#fff;}
    #notif.warn{background:var(--orange);color:#000;}
    @media(max-width:600px){main{padding:14px;}header{padding:10px 14px;}nav{padding:0 14px;}.srow{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}}
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <div id="loginScreen">
    <div class="lglow"></div>
    <div class="lwrap">
    <div class="l-logo">
    <h1>LCI·CLASQUIN</h1>
    <p>SUIVI DES BARRES</p>
    </div>
    <div class="lbox">
    <div class="lbox-title">Sélectionnez votre profil</div>
    <div class="rpicker">
    <button class="ropt" onclick="selRole('cariste')"><span class="ri">🏭</span>Cariste</button>
    <button class="ropt" onclick="selRole('chauffeur')"><span class="ri">🚛</span>Chauffeur</button>
    <button class="ropt" onclick="selRole('responsable')"><span class="ri">👔</span>Responsable</button>
    <button class="ropt" onclick="selRole('admin')"><span class="ri">🔐</span>Administrateur</button>
    </div>
    <div id="loginErr" class="lerr"></div>
    <div id="aform" class="aform">
    <div class="fl">
    <label>Nom d'utilisateur</label>
    <input type="text" id="linUser" placeholder="ex: jean.dupont" autocomplete="off">
    </div>
    <div class="fl">
    <label>Mot de passe</label>
    <input type="password" id="linPass" placeholder="••••••••" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doLogin()">
    </div>
    <button class="btnlogin primary" onclick="doLogin()">Connexion →</button>
    </div>
    <div id="directBtn" style="display:none;">
    <button class="btnlogin ghost" onclick="doDirectLogin()">Accéder sans mot de passe →</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="appShell" style="display:none;flex-direction:column;min-height:100vh;">
    <header>
    <div class="hlogo">
    <div>
    <div class="hname">LCI·CLASQUIN</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hright">
    <div class="uchip">
    <div class="udot"></div>
    <span id="hUserName">—</span>
    <span class="ulvl" id="hUserRole">—</span>
    </div>
    <button class="btnout" onclick="logout()">Déconnexion</button>
    </div>
    </header>
    <nav id="mainNav">
    <button class="active" onclick="showPage('scan',this)">📷 Scanner</button>
    <button id="navHist" onclick="showPage('historique',this)" disabled>📋 Historique</button>
    <button id="navBarres" onclick="showPage('barres',this)" disabled>📦 Barres</button>
    <button id="navExport" onclick="showPage('export',this)" disabled>📤 Export</button>
    <button id="navAdmin" onclick="showPage('admin',this)" style="display:none">⚙️ Admin</button>
    <button id="navSuperAdmin" onclick="showPage('superadmin',this)" style="display:none">👑 Admin+</button>
    </nav>
    <main>
    <div class="page active" id="page-scan">
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">01 — Informations de livraison</div>
    <div class="frow">
    <div class="fg"><label>N° Remorque *</label><input type="text" id="sRemorque" placeholder="ex: AB123CD" oninput="refreshChips()"></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>Nom du chauffeur</label><input type="text" id="sChauffeur" placeholder="ex: LTIFI" oninput="refreshChips()"></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>Agence</label><select id="sAgence" onchange="refreshChips()"><option value="VLF">VLF — Villefranche</option><option value="RDS">RDS — Radès</option></select></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>Direction</label><select id="sDir" onchange="refreshChips()"><option value="IM">IM — Import</option><option value="EX">EX — Export</option></select></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">02 — Moment de la livraison</div>
    <div class="mgrid">
    <button class="mbtn" onclick="setMoment('DEPART',this)"><span class="mi">🏁</span>DÉPART</button>
    <button class="mbtn" onclick="setMoment('ENTREPOT',this)"><span class="mi">🏭</span>ENTREPÔT</button>
    <button class="mbtn" onclick="setMoment('RETOUR',this)"><span class="mi">🔄</span>RETOUR</button>
    <button class="mbtn" onclick="setMoment('CLIENT',this)"><span class="mi">📍</span>CLIENT</button>
    </div>
    <div class="clisub" id="clisub">
    <span class="clilabel">N° client :</span>
    <button class="cnbtn" onclick="setCN(1,this)">1</button>
    <button class="cnbtn" onclick="setCN(2,this)">2</button>
    <button class="cnbtn" onclick="setCN(3,this)">3</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ichips" id="sessionChips"></div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">03 — Scanner une barre</div>
    <div class="szn">
    <div class="si">📷</div>
    <p>Scannez le QR code ou saisissez l'identifiant manuellement</p>
    <input class="sinput" id="scanIn" type="text" placeholder="0001" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doScan()" autocomplete="off" autofocus>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <button class="btn btn-gold" onclick="doScan()">✓ Valider le scan</button>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="document.getElementById('scanIn').focus()">↺ Nouveau scan</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Scans récents</div>
    <div id="recentScans"><div class="empty"><div class="ei">📭</div>Aucun scan</div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-historique">
    <div class="srow" id="histStats"></div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Filtres</div>
    <div class="filt">
    <div class="fg"><label>Remorque</label><input type="text" id="fRem" placeholder="Toutes" oninput="renderHist()"></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>Moment</label><select id="fMom" onchange="renderHist()"><option value="">Tous</option><option>DEPART</option><option>ENTREPOT</option><option>RETOUR</option><option>CLIENT 1</option><option>CLIENT 2</option><option>CLIENT 3</option></select></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>Barre</label><input type="text" id="fBar" placeholder="Toutes" oninput="renderHist()"></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>Rôle</label><select id="fRole" onchange="renderHist()"><option value="">Tous</option><option value="cariste">Cariste</option><option value="chauffeur">Chauffeur</option><option value="responsable">Responsable</option><option value="admin">Admin</option></select></div>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="clearFilt()">✕ Reset</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Historique complet</div>
    <div class="tw"><table><thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Date / Heure</th><th>Barre</th><th>Moment</th><th>Remorque</th><th>Rôle</th><th>Utilisateur</th><th>Agence</th><th>Direction</th></tr></thead><tbody id="histBody"></tbody></table></div>
    <div id="histEmpty" class="empty" style="display:none;"><div class="ei">📋</div>Aucun scan</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-barres">
    <div class="srow" id="barreStats"></div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Filtres</div>
    <div class="filt">
    <div class="fg"><label>Statut</label><select id="fStat" onchange="renderBarres()"><option value="">Tous</option><option value="ENTREPOT_VLF">Entrepôt France</option><option value="ENTREPOT_TUN">Entrepôt Tunisie</option><option value="TRANSIT">En transit</option><option value="CLIENT">Chez client</option></select></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>N° Barre</label><input type="text" id="fBnum" placeholder="ex: 0001" oninput="renderBarres()"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="barresGrid" class="bgrid"></div>
    <div id="barresEmpty" class="empty" style="display:none;"><div class="ei">📦</div>Aucune barre</div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-export">
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Export global</div>
    <p style="color:var(--text2);font-size:13px;margin-bottom:4px;">Exporte l'intégralité de l'historique en CSV.</p>
    <div class="exprow">
    <button class="btn btn-gold" onclick="exportCSV('all')">⬇ CSV Global</button>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="shareWA('all')">💬 WhatsApp</button>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="shareMail('all')">✉ Email</button>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="shareMsg('all')">📨 Message</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Export par livraison</div>
    <div class="frow"><div class="fg"><label>Remorque</label><select id="expRemSel"></select></div></div>
    <div class="exprow">
    <button class="btn btn-gold" onclick="exportCSV('rem')">⬇ CSV Livraison</button>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="shareWA('rem')">💬 WhatsApp</button>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="shareMail('rem')">✉ Email</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Format objet email LCI-Clasquin</div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:8px;padding:14px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;line-height:2;">
    <div><span style="color:var(--text2)">Format :</span> <span style="color:var(--gold)">IM/EX_LIEU_CHAUFFEUR_PLAQUE_DATE</span></div>
    <div><span style="color:var(--text2)">Import :</span> <span style="color:var(--green)">IM_RDS_LTIFI_AB123CD_<span id="dateEx1"></span></span></div>
    <div><span style="color:var(--text2)">Export :</span> <span style="color:var(--blue)">EX_VLF_PROST_AB123CD_<span id="dateEx2"></span></span></div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);">Contact : <strong style="color:var(--text)">Bouras Imrane</strong> — <a href="mailto:imrane.bouras@lci-clasquin.com" style="color:var(--blue)">imrane.bouras@lci-clasquin.com</a></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-admin">
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Créer un compte</div>
    <div class="frow">
    <div class="fg"><label>Rôle</label><select id="newRole"><option value="cariste">Cariste</option><option value="chauffeur">Chauffeur</option><option value="responsable">Responsable</option></select></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>Nom d'utilisateur</label><input type="text" id="newUser" placeholder="ex: jean.dupont"></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>Mot de passe</label><input type="password" id="newPass" placeholder="Min. 4 caractères"></div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-gold" onclick="createUser()">+ Créer le compte</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Comptes existants</div>
    <div id="userList"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-superadmin">
    <div class="card" style="border-color:rgba(240,192,64,.25);background:rgba(240,192,64,.03);">
    <div class="ctitle" style="color:var(--gold);">👑 Administration totale</div>
    <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);">Accès exclusif — Imrane Bouras</p>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Créer un compte (tous niveaux)</div>
    <div class="frow">
    <div class="fg"><label>Rôle</label><select id="saNewRole"><option value="cariste">Cariste</option><option value="chauffeur">Chauffeur</option><option value="responsable">Responsable</option><option value="admin">Administrateur</option></select></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>Nom d'utilisateur</label><input type="text" id="saNewUser" placeholder="ex: ali.ben"></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>Mot de passe</label><input type="password" id="saNewPass" placeholder="Mot de passe"></div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-gold" onclick="saCreateUser()">+ Créer le compte</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Tous les comptes</div>
    <div id="saUserList"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="border-color:rgba(168,85,247,.25);">
    <div class="ctitle" style="color:var(--purple);">🕵️ Mode fantôme</div>
    <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px;">Masque votre profil dans la liste des administrateurs visible par les autres admins.</p>
    <div class="toggle-wrap">
    <label class="toggle"><input type="checkbox" id="ghostToggle" onchange="toggleGhost()"><span class="tslider"></span></label>
    <span class="toggle-label" id="ghostLabel">Mode fantôme désactivé</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Gérer les barres</div>
    <div class="frow">
    <div class="fg"><label>Identifiant barre</label><input type="text" id="saBarreId" placeholder="ex: 0042"></div>
    <div class="fg"><label>Statut initial</label><select id="saBarreStat"><option value="ENTREPOT_VLF">Entrepôt France (VLF)</option><option value="ENTREPOT_TUN">Entrepôt Tunisie (RDS)</option></select></div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;"><button class="btn btn-gold" onclick="addBarre()">+ Ajouter barre</button></div>
    <div class="div"></div>
    <div id="saBarreList"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="border-color:rgba(255,87,87,.15);">
    <div class="ctitle" style="color:var(--red);">⚠ Zone dangereuse</div>
    <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px;">Ces actions sont irréversibles.</p>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <button class="btn btn-danger" onclick="confirmClearHist()">🗑 Effacer l'historique</button>
    <button class="btn btn-danger" onclick="confirmClearAll()">💥 Réinitialiser tout</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="ctitle">Logs de connexion</div>
    <div id="logsContainer"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </main>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-overlay" id="modal">
    <div class="modal-box">
    <div class="modal-title" id="modalTitle"></div>
    <div class="modal-sub" id="modalSub"></div>
    <div id="modalBody"></div>
    <div class="modal-actions" id="modalActions"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="notif"></div>
    <script>
    function load(k,def){try{const v=localStorage.getItem(k);return v?JSON.parse(v):def;}catch{return def;}}
    function save(k,v){localStorage.setItem(k,JSON.stringify(v));}
    const SUPER_ADMIN={username:'Imrane',password:'lcisecretadmin',role:'superadmin'};
    let users=load('lci_users',[]);
    let scans=load('lci_scans',[]);
    let barres=load('lci_barres',{});
    let logs=load('lci_logs',[]);
    let ghost=load('lci_ghost',false);
    function saveAll(){save('lci_users',users);save('lci_scans',scans);save('lci_barres',barres);save('lci_logs',logs);save('lci_ghost',ghost);}
    let session={role:null,username:null,moment:null,clientNum:null};
    let selRoleVal=null;
    function selRole(r){
    selRoleVal=r;
    document.querySelectorAll('.ropt').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('sel'));
    event.currentTarget.classList.add('sel');
    const aform=document.getElementById('aform');
    const dirBtn=document.getElementById('directBtn');
    const lerr=document.getElementById('loginErr');
    lerr.style.display='none';
    if(r==='cariste'||r==='chauffeur'){aform.classList.remove('show');dirBtn.style.display='block';}
    else{aform.classList.add('show');dirBtn.style.display='none';document.getElementById('linUser').value='';document.getElementById('linPass').value='';setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('linUser').focus(),100);}
    }
    function doDirectLogin(){
    if(!selRoleVal)return;
    session.role=selRoleVal;
    session.username=selRoleVal==='cariste'?'Cariste':'Chauffeur';
    addLog('success',`Connexion directe : ${session.username} (${session.role})`);
    openApp();
    }
    function doLogin(){
    const u=document.getElementById('linUser').value.trim();
    const p=document.getElementById('linPass').value;
    const err=document.getElementById('loginErr');
    if(!u||!p){showErr(err,'Remplissez tous les champs');return;}
    if(u===SUPER_ADMIN.username&&p===SUPER_ADMIN.password){session.role='superadmin';session.username=SUPER_ADMIN.username;addLog('success',`Connexion Admin+ : ${u}`);openApp();return;}
    const found=users.find(usr=>usr.username===u&&usr.password===p);
    if(found){
    if(selRoleVal!==found.role){showErr(err,`Ce compte est de type "${found.role}"`);addLog('warn',`Tentative rôle incorrect : ${u} → ${selRoleVal}`);return;}
    session.role=found.role;session.username=found.username;addLog('success',`Connexion : ${u} (${found.role})`);openApp();return;
    }
    showErr(err,'Identifiants incorrects');addLog('error',`Échec connexion : ${u}`);
    }
    function showErr(el,msg){el.textContent=msg;el.style.display='block';}
    function openApp(){
    document.getElementById('loginScreen').style.display='none';
    const app=document.getElementById('appShell');app.style.display='flex';
    document.getElementById('hUserName').textContent=session.username;
    document.getElementById('hUserRole').textContent=roleLabel(session.role);
    const canFull=['responsable','admin','superadmin'].includes(session.role);
    const canAdmin=['responsable','admin','superadmin'].includes(session.role);
    const isSA=session.role==='superadmin';
    document.getElementById('navHist').disabled=!canFull;
    document.getElementById('navBarres').disabled=!canFull;
    document.getElementById('navExport').disabled=!canFull;
    document.getElementById('navAdmin').style.display=canAdmin?'':'none';
    document.getElementById('navSuperAdmin').style.display=isSA?'':'none';
    refreshChips();renderRecentScans();
    const d=new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR').replace(/\//g,'');
    document.getElementById('dateEx1').textContent=d;
    document.getElementById('dateEx2').textContent=d;
    document.getElementById('ghostToggle').checked=ghost;
    document.getElementById('ghostLabel').textContent=ghost?'Mode fantôme activé — profil masqué':'Mode fantôme désactivé';
    }
    function logout(){
    session={role:null,username:null,moment:null,clientNum:null};
    document.getElementById('appShell').style.display='none';
    document.getElementById('loginScreen').style.display='flex';
    selRoleVal=null;
    document.querySelectorAll('.ropt').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('sel'));
    document.getElementById('aform').classList.remove('show');
    document.getElementById('directBtn').style.display='none';
    document.getElementById('loginErr').style.display='none';
    document.querySelectorAll('.mbtn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById('clisub').classList.remove('show');
    session.moment=null;session.clientNum=null;
    showPage('scan',document.querySelector('nav button'));
    }
    function showPage(id,btn){
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('nav button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById('page-'+id).classList.add('active');
    if(btn)btn.classList.add('active');
    if(id==='historique')renderHist();
    if(id==='barres')renderBarres();
    if(id==='export')renderExport();
    if(id==='admin')renderAdmin();
    if(id==='superadmin')renderSuperAdmin();
    }
    function setMoment(m,btn){
    session.moment=m;session.clientNum=null;
    document.querySelectorAll('.mbtn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    const sub=document.getElementById('clisub');
    if(m==='CLIENT'){sub.classList.add('show');}
    else{sub.classList.remove('show');document.querySelectorAll('.cnbtn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));}
    refreshChips();
    }
    function setCN(n,btn){
    session.clientNum=n;
    document.querySelectorAll('.cnbtn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');refreshChips();
    }
    function refreshChips(){
    const rem=document.getElementById('sRemorque')?.value.trim().toUpperCase()||'';
    const chf=document.getElementById('sChauffeur')?.value.trim().toUpperCase()||'';
    const agc=document.getElementById('sAgence')?.value||'VLF';
    const dir=document.getElementById('sDir')?.value||'IM';
    const m=session.moment;
    const ml=m==='CLIENT'&&session.clientNum?`CLIENT ${session.clientNum}`:m;
    const chips=[
    session.username?`<div class="ichip set">👤 ${session.username}</div>`:'',
    `<div class="ichip ${m?'set':''}">📍 ${ml||'Moment non défini'}</div>`,
    `<div class="ichip ${rem?'set':''}">🚛 ${rem||'Remorque non définie'}</div>`,
    chf?`<div class="ichip set">🧑 ${chf}</div>`:'',
    `<div class="ichip">${dir} · ${agc}</div>`,
    ].filter(Boolean).join('');
    document.getElementById('sessionChips').innerHTML=chips;
    }
    function doScan(){
    const inp=document.getElementById('scanIn');
    const id=inp.value.trim().toUpperCase();
    const rem=document.getElementById('sRemorque').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    const chf=document.getElementById('sChauffeur').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    const agc=document.getElementById('sAgence').value;
    const dir=document.getElementById('sDir').value;
    if(!id){notify('Saisissez un identifiant','err');return;}
    if(!session.moment){notify('Sélectionnez le moment','err');return;}
    if(session.moment==='CLIENT'&&!session.clientNum){notify('Sélectionnez le N° client','err');return;}
    if(!rem){notify('Saisissez le N° de remorque','err');return;}
    const momentLabel=session.moment==='CLIENT'?`CLIENT ${session.clientNum}`:session.moment;
    const now=new Date();
    const scan={id:Date.now(),barre:id,moment:momentLabel,role:session.role,username:session.username,remorque:rem,chauffeur:chf||'—',agence:agc,direction:dir,date:now.toLocaleDateString('fr-FR'),heure:now.toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit'}),ts:now.getTime()};
    scans.unshift(scan);
    barres[id]=barres[id]||{id,addedAt:scan.date,addedBy:session.username};
    barres[id].lastScan=scan;
    saveAll();inp.value='';inp.focus();renderRecentScans();
    notify(`✓ Barre ${id} · ${momentLabel}`,'ok');
    }
    function renderRecentScans(){
    const el=document.getElementById('recentScans');
    const r=scans.slice(0,8);
    if(!r.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty"><div class="ei">📭</div>Aucun scan</div>';return;}
    el.innerHTML=`<div class="tw"><table><thead><tr><th>Barre</th><th>Moment</th><th>Heure</th><th>Remorque</th></tr></thead><tbody>${r.map(s=>`<tr><td class="mono" style="color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;">${s.barre}</td><td>${mBadge(s.moment)}</td><td class="mono" style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;">${s.date}<br>${s.heure}</td><td class="mono">${s.remorque}</td></tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table></div>`;
    }
    function renderHist(){
    const fr=document.getElementById('fRem').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    const fm=document.getElementById('fMom').value;
    const fb=document.getElementById('fBar').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    const frl=document.getElementById('fRole').value;
    let list=scans.filter(s=>{
    if(fr&&!s.remorque.includes(fr))return false;
    if(fm&&s.moment!==fm)return false;
    if(fb&&!s.barre.includes(fb))return false;
    if(frl&&s.role!==frl)return false;
    return true;
    });
    const body=document.getElementById('histBody');
    const empty=document.getElementById('histEmpty');
    if(!list.length){body.innerHTML='';empty.style.display='block';}
    else{
    empty.style.display='none';
    body.innerHTML=list.map((s,i)=>`<tr><td class="mono" style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;">${list.length-i}</td><td class="mono" style="font-size:11px;">${s.date}<br><span style="color:var(--text2)">${s.heure}</span></td><td class="mono" style="color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;font-size:16px;">${s.barre}</td><td>${mBadge(s.moment)}</td><td class="mono">${s.remorque}</td><td>${rBadge(s.role)}</td><td style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);">${s.username||'—'}</td><td><span class="badge ${s.agence==='VLF'?'bg-blue':'bg-purple'}">${s.agence}</span></td><td><span class="badge ${s.direction==='IM'?'bg-green':'bg-orange'}">${s.direction}</span></td></tr>`).join('');
    }
    const barresU=[...new Set(list.map(s=>s.barre))].length;
    const rems=[...new Set(list.map(s=>s.remorque))].length;
    const today=new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR');
    const todayN=list.filter(s=>s.date===today).length;
    document.getElementById('histStats').innerHTML=`<div class="scard"><div class="sv" style="color:var(--gold)">${list.length}</div><div class="sl">Scans</div></div><div class="scard"><div class="sv" style="color:var(--blue)">${barresU}</div><div class="sl">Barres uniques</div></div><div class="scard"><div class="sv" style="color:var(--green)">${rems}</div><div class="sl">Remorques</div></div><div class="scard"><div class="sv" style="color:var(--orange)">${todayN}</div><div class="sl">Aujourd'hui</div></div>`;
    }
    function clearFilt(){['fRem','fBar'].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id).value='');['fMom','fRole'].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id).value='');renderHist();}
    function renderBarres(){
    const fs=document.getElementById('fStat').value;
    const fn=document.getElementById('fBnum').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    const all=Object.values(barres);
    const list=all.filter(b=>{if(fn&&!b.id.includes(fn))return false;if(fs){const st=barreStatus(b);if(st.code!==fs)return false;}return true;});
    const vlf=all.filter(b=>barreStatus(b).code==='ENTREPOT_VLF').length;
    const rds=all.filter(b=>barreStatus(b).code==='ENTREPOT_TUN').length;
    const tr=all.filter(b=>barreStatus(b).code==='TRANSIT').length;
    const cl=all.filter(b=>barreStatus(b).code==='CLIENT').length;
    document.getElementById('barreStats').innerHTML=`<div class="scard"><div class="sv" style="color:var(--text)">${all.length}</div><div class="sl">Total barres</div></div><div class="scard"><div class="sv" style="color:var(--blue)">${vlf}</div><div class="sl">Entrepôt France</div></div><div class="scard"><div class="sv" style="color:var(--purple)">${rds}</div><div class="sl">Entrepôt Tunisie</div></div><div class="scard"><div class="sv" style="color:var(--orange)">${tr}</div><div class="sl">En transit</div></div><div class="scard"><div class="sv" style="color:var(--green)">${cl}</div><div class="sl">Chez client</div></div>`;
    const grid=document.getElementById('barresGrid');
    const empty=document.getElementById('barresEmpty');
    if(!list.length){grid.innerHTML='';empty.style.display='block';return;}
    empty.style.display='none';
    list.sort((a,b)=>a.id.localeCompare(b.id));
    grid.innerHTML=list.map(b=>{const st=barreStatus(b);const ls=b.lastScan;return `<div class="bcard"><div class="bid">${b.id}</div><div style="margin-bottom:7px;">${st.badge}</div><div class="binfo">${ls?`<strong>Dernier scan :</strong> ${ls.moment}<br><strong>Date :</strong> ${ls.date} ${ls.heure}<br><strong>Remorque :</strong> ${ls.remorque}<br><strong>Par :</strong> ${ls.username||ls.role}`:'<em>Aucun scan</em>'}</div></div>`;}).join('');
    }
    function barreStatus(b){
    const ls=b.lastScan;
    if(!ls)return{code:'ENTREPOT_VLF',badge:'<span class="badge bg-blue">🏭 Entrepôt France</span>'};
    const m=ls.moment;
    if(m==='DEPART')return{code:'TRANSIT',badge:'<span class="badge bg-orange">🚛 En transit</span>'};
    if(m==='ENTREPOT'||m==='RETOUR'){if(ls.agence==='VLF')return{code:'ENTREPOT_VLF',badge:'<span class="badge bg-blue">🏭 Entrepôt France (VLF)</span>'};return{code:'ENTREPOT_TUN',badge:'<span class="badge bg-purple">🏭 Entrepôt Tunisie (RDS)</span>'};}
    if(m.startsWith('CLIENT'))return{code:'CLIENT',badge:'<span class="badge bg-green">📍 Chez client</span>'};
    return{code:'INCONNU',badge:'<span class="badge bg-gray">?</span>'};
    }
    function renderExport(){
    const rems=[...new Set(scans.map(s=>s.remorque))];
    const sel=document.getElementById('expRemSel');
    sel.innerHTML='<option value="">— Toutes —</option>'+rems.map(r=>`<option>${r}</option>`).join('');
    }
    function getExpScans(type){if(type==='all')return scans;const r=document.getElementById('expRemSel').value;return r?scans.filter(s=>s.remorque===r):scans;}
    function buildCSV(list){const h='N°,Date,Heure,Barre,Moment,Remorque,Rôle,Utilisateur,Agence,Direction\n';return h+list.map((s,i)=>`${i+1},"${s.date}","${s.heure}","${s.barre}","${s.moment}","${s.remorque}","${s.role}","${s.username||'—'}","${s.agence}","${s.direction}"`).join('\n');}
    function buildSubject(list){if(!list.length)return'LCI_CLASQUIN_EXPORT';const s=list[0];const d=s.date.replace(/\//g,'');const chf=s.chauffeur&&s.chauffeur!=='—'?s.chauffeur:'CHAUFFEUR';return`${s.direction}_${s.agence}_${chf}_${s.remorque}_${d}`;}
    function exportCSV(type){const list=getExpScans(type);if(!list.length){notify('Aucune donnée','warn');return;}const blob=new Blob([buildCSV(list)],{type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8;'});const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=url;a.download=buildSubject(list)+'.csv';a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);notify('CSV téléchargé','ok');}
    function shareMail(type){const list=getExpScans(type);const subj=buildSubject(list);const body=`Bonjour,\n\nVeuillez trouver l'historique de scan (${list.length} scans).\nRemorque : ${list[0]?.remorque||'—'}\n\nCordialement,\nLCI-Clasquin VLF`;window.location.href=`mailto:imrane.bouras@lci-clasquin.com?subject=${encodeURIComponent(subj)}&body=${encodeURIComponent(body)}`;}
    function shareWA(type){const list=getExpScans(type);if(!list.length){notify('Aucune donnée','warn');return;}const txt=`📦 *LCI-CLASQUIN — Suivi barres*\n🏷 Réf: ${buildSubject(list)}\n📊 Scans: ${list.length}\n🚛 Remorque: ${list[0]?.remorque}\n👤 Par: ${list[0]?.username||'—'}`;window.open(`https://wa.me/?text=${encodeURIComponent(txt)}`,'_blank');}
    function shareMsg(type){const list=getExpScans(type);const txt=`LCI-Clasquin | ${buildSubject(list)} | ${list.length} scans`;if(navigator.share){const file=new File([buildCSV(list)],buildSubject(list)+'.csv',{type:'text/csv'});navigator.share({title:buildSubject(list),text:txt,files:[file]}).catch(()=>{window.location.href=`sms:?body=${encodeURIComponent(txt)}`;});}else{window.location.href=`sms:?body=${encodeURIComponent(txt)}`;}}
    function renderAdmin(){
    document.getElementById('newRole').innerHTML=`<option value="cariste">Cariste</option><option value="chauffeur">Chauffeur</option><option value="responsable">Responsable</option>`;
    const el=document.getElementById('userList');
    const visibleUsers=users.filter(u=>{if(session.role==='responsable'&&u.role==='admin')return false;return true;});
    if(!visibleUsers.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty"><div class="ei">👥</div>Aucun compte</div>';return;}
    el.innerHTML=visibleUsers.map(u=>`<div class="urow"><div class="ur-left"><div><div class="ur-name">${u.username}</div><div class="ur-role">${roleLabel(u.role)}</div></div>${rBadge(u.role)}</div><div class="ur-right"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="deleteUser('${u.username}')">Supprimer</button></div></div>`).join('');
    }
    function createUser(){
    const role=document.getElementById('newRole').value;
    const user=document.getElementById('newUser').value.trim();
    const pass=document.getElementById('newPass').value;
    if(!user||!pass){notify('Remplissez tous les champs','err');return;}
    if(pass.length<4){notify('Mot de passe trop court (min. 4 car.)','err');return;}
    if(user===SUPER_ADMIN.username){notify("Nom d'utilisateur réservé",'err');return;}
    if(users.find(u=>u.username===user)){notify("Nom d'utilisateur déjà utilisé",'err');return;}
    users.push({username:user,password:pass,role,createdBy:session.username,createdAt:new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR')});
    saveAll();addLog('success',`Compte créé : ${user} (${role}) par ${session.username}`);
    document.getElementById('newUser').value='';document.getElementById('newPass').value='';
    renderAdmin();notify(`Compte "${user}" créé`,'ok');
    }
    function deleteUser(username){showModal('Supprimer le compte',`Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer le compte "${username}" ?`,'',[{label:'Annuler',cls:'btn-ghost',fn:'closeModal()'},{label:'Supprimer',cls:'btn-danger',fn:`confirmDelete('${username}')`}]);}
    function confirmDelete(username){users=users.filter(u=>u.username!==username);saveAll();addLog('warn',`Compte supprimé : ${username} par ${session.username}`);closeModal();renderAdmin();if(document.getElementById('page-superadmin').classList.contains('active'))renderSuperAdmin();notify(`Compte "${username}" supprimé`,'ok');}
    function renderSuperAdmin(){
    document.getElementById('ghostToggle').checked=ghost;
    document.getElementById('ghostLabel').textContent=ghost?'Mode fantôme activé — vous êtes invisible':'Mode fantôme désactivé';
    const el=document.getElementById('saUserList');
    if(!users.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty"><div class="ei">👥</div>Aucun compte</div>';}
    else{el.innerHTML=users.map(u=>`<div class="urow"><div class="ur-left"><div><div class="ur-name">${u.username}</div><div class="ur-role" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);">${roleLabel(u.role)} · Créé par ${u.createdBy||'—'} le ${u.createdAt||'—'}</div></div>${rBadge(u.role)}</div><div class="ur-right"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="editUserPass('${u.username}')">✏ MDP</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="deleteUser('${u.username}')">Supprimer</button></div></div>`).join('');}
    renderSABarres();
    const lc=document.getElementById('logsContainer');
    if(!logs.length){lc.innerHTML='<div class="empty"><div class="ei">📄</div>Aucun log</div>';return;}
    lc.innerHTML=logs.slice(0,50).map(l=>`<div class="log-entry ${l.type}"><div class="log-time">${l.date} ${l.heure}</div><div>${l.msg}</div></div>`).join('');
    }
    function renderSABarres(){
    const el=document.getElementById('saBarreList');
    const all=Object.values(barres);
    if(!all.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="color:var(--text2);font-size:12px;font-family:var(--mono);">Aucune barre enregistrée</div>';return;}
    el.innerHTML=`<div class="tw"><table><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Statut</th><th>Dernier scan</th><th>Ajoutée le</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>${all.sort((a,b)=>a.id.localeCompare(b.id)).map(b=>`<tr><td class="mono" style="color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;">${b.id}</td><td>${barreStatus(b).badge}</td><td class="mono" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);">${b.lastScan?b.lastScan.date+' '+b.lastScan.heure:'—'}</td><td class="mono" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);">${b.addedAt||'—'}</td><td><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="deleteBarre('${b.id}')">✕</button></td></tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table></div>`;
    }
    function saCreateUser(){
    const role=document.getElementById('saNewRole').value;
    const user=document.getElementById('saNewUser').value.trim();
    const pass=document.getElementById('saNewPass').value;
    if(!user||!pass){notify('Remplissez tous les champs','err');return;}
    if(pass.length<4){notify('Mot de passe trop court','err');return;}
    if(user===SUPER_ADMIN.username){notify('Nom réservé','err');return;}
    if(users.find(u=>u.username===user)){notify('Nom déjà utilisé','err');return;}
    users.push({username:user,password:pass,role,createdBy:'Imrane',createdAt:new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR')});
    saveAll();addLog('success',`[SA] Compte créé : ${user} (${role})`);
    document.getElementById('saNewUser').value='';document.getElementById('saNewPass').value='';
    renderSuperAdmin();notify(`Compte "${user}" créé`,'ok');
    }
    function editUserPass(username){showModal('Modifier le mot de passe',`Nouveau mot de passe pour "${username}"`,`<div class="fl"><label>Nouveau mot de passe</label><input type="password" id="modalPass" placeholder="Min. 4 caractères" style="width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:14px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:8px;outline:none;margin-top:5px;"></div>`,[{label:'Annuler',cls:'btn-ghost',fn:'closeModal()'},{label:'Confirmer',cls:'btn-gold',fn:`confirmEditPass('${username}')`}]);}
    function confirmEditPass(username){const np=document.getElementById('modalPass')?.value;if(!np||np.length<4){notify('Mot de passe trop court','err');return;}const u=users.find(u=>u.username===username);if(u){u.password=np;saveAll();addLog('warn',`[SA] MDP modifié : ${username}`);}closeModal();notify(`MDP de "${username}" mis à jour`,'ok');}
    function addBarre(){
    const id=document.getElementById('saBarreId').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    const st=document.getElementById('saBarreStat').value;
    if(!id){notify('Saisissez un identifiant','err');return;}
    if(barres[id]){notify('Barre déjà existante','warn');return;}
    const now=new Date();
    barres[id]={id,addedAt:now.toLocaleDateString('fr-FR'),addedBy:'Imrane',lastScan:{moment:'ENTREPOT',agence:st==='ENTREPOT_VLF'?'VLF':'RDS',date:now.toLocaleDateString('fr-FR'),heure:now.toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}),remorque:'—',username:'Imrane',role:'superadmin'}};
    saveAll();document.getElementById('saBarreId').value='';renderSABarres();notify(`Barre ${id} ajoutée`,'ok');
    }
    function deleteBarre(id){showModal('Supprimer la barre',`Supprimer la barre "${id}" ?`,'',[{label:'Annuler',cls:'btn-ghost',fn:'closeModal()'},{label:'Supprimer',cls:'btn-danger',fn:`confirmDeleteBarre('${id}')`}]);}
    function confirmDeleteBarre(id){delete barres[id];saveAll();closeModal();renderSABarres();renderBarres();notify(`Barre ${id} supprimée`,'ok');}
    function toggleGhost(){ghost=document.getElementById('ghostToggle').checked;document.getElementById('ghostLabel').textContent=ghost?'Mode fantôme activé — vous êtes invisible':'Mode fantôme désactivé';saveAll();addLog('warn',ghost?'[SA] Mode fantôme activé':'[SA] Mode fantôme désactivé');notify(ghost?'🕵️ Mode fantôme activé':'Mode fantôme désactivé','ok');}
    function confirmClearHist(){showModal("Effacer l'historique","Êtes-vous sûr ? Tous les scans seront supprimés.",'',[{label:'Annuler',cls:'btn-ghost',fn:'closeModal()'},{label:'Effacer',cls:'btn-danger',fn:'doClearHist()'}]);}
    function doClearHist(){scans=[];saveAll();addLog('warn','[SA] Historique effacé');closeModal();renderSuperAdmin();notify('Historique effacé','ok');}
    function confirmClearAll(){showModal('Réinitialiser tout','Cette action efface TOUTES les données (scans, barres, comptes).','',[{label:'Annuler',cls:'btn-ghost',fn:'closeModal()'},{label:'Réinitialiser',cls:'btn-danger',fn:'doClearAll()'}]);}
    function doClearAll(){scans=[];barres={};users=[];addLog('warn','[SA] Réinitialisation complète');saveAll();closeModal();renderSuperAdmin();notify('Tout réinitialisé','ok');}
    function addLog(type,msg){const now=new Date();logs.unshift({type,msg,date:now.toLocaleDateString('fr-FR'),heure:now.toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit'})});if(logs.length>200)logs=logs.slice(0,200);save('lci_logs',logs);}
    function mBadge(m){const map={'DEPART':['bg-gold','🏁'],'ENTREPOT':['bg-blue','🏭'],'RETOUR':['bg-orange','🔄'],'CLIENT 1':['bg-green','📍'],'CLIENT 2':['bg-green','📍'],'CLIENT 3':['bg-green','📍']};const[c,i]=map[m]||['bg-gray','?'];return`<span class="badge ${c}">${i} ${m}</span>`;}
    function rBadge(r){const map={cariste:'bg-cyan',chauffeur:'bg-orange',responsable:'bg-blue',admin:'bg-purple',superadmin:'bg-gold'};return`<span class="badge ${map[r]||'bg-gray'}">${roleLabel(r)}</span>`;}
    function roleLabel(r){return{cariste:'Cariste',chauffeur:'Chauffeur',responsable:'Responsable',admin:'Admin',superadmin:'Admin+'}[r]||r;}
    function showModal(title,sub,body,actions){document.getElementById('modalTitle').textContent=title;document.getElementById('modalSub').textContent=sub;document.getElementById('modalBody').innerHTML=body;document.getElementById('modalActions').innerHTML=actions.map(a=>`<button class="btn ${a.cls}" onclick="${a.fn}">${a.label}</button>`).join('');document.getElementById('modal').classList.add('show');}
    function closeModal(){document.getElementById('modal').classList.remove('show');}
    let nt;
    function notify(msg,type='ok'){const el=document.getElementById('notif');el.textContent=msg;el.className=`show ${type}`;clearTimeout(nt);nt=setTimeout(()=>el.className='',2800);}
    refreshChips();
    renderRecentScans();
    </script>
    </body>
    </html>
